dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HJ 150 IH: Terminating the national emergency declared to impose global tariffs.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Meeks submitted the following joint resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: Terminating the national emergency declared to impose global tariffs.

section.text: That, pursuant to section 202 of the National Emergencies Act (50 U.S.C. 1622), the national emergency declared on April 2, 2025, by the President in Executive Order 14257 (90 Fed. Reg. 15041) is terminated effective on the date of the enactment of this joint resolution.
